full_text:
Ruan Yu (Yuanyu) 阮瑀 (元瑜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ruan Yu (阮瑀), styledYuanyu (元瑜), was born in Chenliu. One of the Seven Jian’an Masters, studied under Cai Yong. Ruan Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
